resolutions.resolution: Retry is bounded and deterministic for safe reads/idempotent writes; Gmail Trash is never blindly retried.
Git and Release limits use official current facts; plan-dependent LFS capacity is UNKNOWN until owner-provisioned.
Different-model review means two distinct model families reviewing read-only after implementation.
Policy Evals test deterministic enforcement; they do not claim live model behavior.
Real Gmail, private repository, production Secrets, protected load and remote CI remain outside this run.
The stale temporary-upload risk wording is not implemented; the canonical serial delete-then-upload one-asset protocol remains authoritative.
PDF active-content inspection traverses the decoded object graph with bounded depth and node count; encrypted PDFs remain deferred until the bounded decrypt path.
L3 uses eight concurrent workers against the content-identity index, while CapacityAssessment and KillImpact gate callable operations before side effects.
Plaintext cleanup claims are limited to cooperative normal, error, cancel, timeout and MemoryError exits for arena-owned buffers; hard-kill RAM erasure is not claimed.
